title: VIDEO: SHA Executive Director insists he won't resign in confrontation with I-Team
summary: Syracuse Housing Authority Executive Director Bill Simmons refused to resign amid agency problems during a confrontational I-Team interview. The SHA held a secret board meeting that violated New York State Open Meetings Law by conducting over an hour of discussion and taking votes before allowing press and public access.
department_refs: Department of Neighborhood and Business Development

political_signal.description: Media investigation into SHA leadership accountability and governance violations; potential pressure for executive action regarding director's tenure and agency compliance.

processing_notes: Article emphasizes open meetings law violation and leadership defiance; CIO should note governance and compliance risks at SHA
No budget figures or specific innovation initiatives mentioned
Commissioner of Neighborhood & Business Development present at meeting—indicates inter-departmental awareness of SHA issues
